oneOf.title: string
oneOf.description: An amount of money as decimal string.

oneOf.title: integer
oneOf.description: An amount of money as integer. Must be given in smallest possible unit according to ISO 4217. E.g. 1.99 USD = 199 (cents), 30 BRL = 3000 (centavos), 5 HUF = 500 (filler), 555 JPY = 555 (Yen), 44 BHD = 44000 (fils). This option is not available for cryptocurrency amount, in such a case please use the decimal string.
